heading: Authorization of appropriations; disbursements
label: 276i Authorization of appropriations; disbursements
text: An appropriation of $120,000 annually is authorized, $60,000 of which shall be for the House delegation and $60,000 for the Senate delegation, or so much thereof as may be necessary, to assist in meeting the expenses of the United States group of the Mexico-United States Interparliamentary group for each fiscal year for which an appropriation is made, the House and Senate portions of such appropriation to be disbursed on vouchers to be approved by the Chairman of the House delegation and the Chairman of the Senate delegation, respectively.
notes: Amendments2001— substituted “$120,000” for “$80,000” and substituted “$60,000” for “$40,000” in two places.Pub. L. 107–771994— substituted “$80,000” for “$100,000” and substituted “$40,000” for “$50,000” in two places.Pub. L. 103–2361990— substituted “$100,000” for “$50,000” and “$50,000” for “$25,000” in two places.Pub. L. 101–5151976— increased annual appropriations authorization to $50,000 from $30,000 and amount for the House and Senate delegations to $25,000 from $15,000.Pub. L. 94–350

Permanent Appropriation for Delegation ExpensesA permanent appropriation to carry out this section is contained in section 101(a) [title III, § 303] of , as amended, set out as a note under .Pub. L. 100–202section 276e of this title
